name: RenderPreview
description: Builds and renders a Preview and waits until a snapshot of the resulting UI is available.

sourceFilePath.description: The path to the file within the Xcode project organization (e.g., 'ProjectName/Sources/MyFile.swift')

previewDefinitionIndexInFile.description: The zero based index of the #Preview macro or PreviewProvider struct definition in the source file counting from the top. Defaults to 0.

timeout.description: The time in seconds to wait for the rendering of the preview to complete. Defaults to 120 seconds.
